extension.description: Plays the Sky TG24 live HLS stream through the local skytg24-proxy-copilot reverse-proxy (http://192.168.10.245:6443/stream). The stream host and port can be changed in the add-on settings.
extension.disclaimer: This add-on requires the skytg24-proxy-copilot service to be running and reachable on your local network.
extension.news: v1.2.0 – inputstream.adaptive is now optional (disabled by default for faster start-up); enable in add-on settings. v1.1.0 – Plugin now plays the stream directly on launch (no submenu). v1.0.0 – Initial release.
